How We Work

Our Process

End-to-end campaign management from strategy to reporting.

  • Define campaign goals based on client objectives
  • Establish ad budget aligned with campaign goals and create a media plan according to investment
  • Build audiences based on the target demographics of the client's product or service
  • Confirm campaign activation dates and optimize based on key inflection points during the campaign
  • Manage ad campaigns based on objectives and continuously optimize
  • Track budget and adjust campaigns based on ad set performance
  • Deliver live tracking reports for the client
  • Final campaign report with highlights and next steps
Targeting

Audience Segmentation Strategy

We plan targeting based on:

Audience Retargeting
Lookalike Audiences
Brand-Related Interests

Meta Advantage+
Case Study

Carupano USA

Premium Venezuelan rum brand expanding into the American market. We ran an awareness and brand recognition campaign focused on increasing reach in specific US states where the product is available, while optimizing audiences toward the brand's target demographic.

  • Recovered and restructured the brand's Business Manager from scratch
  • Built a full media plan structured around the brand's investment capacity and market objectives
  • Created potential audiences segmented by interests, socioeconomic level, geographic region, and product line availability
  • Installed and configured Meta Pixel for efficient traffic tracking and retargeting audience creation
  • Ran A/B tests on creatives to identify which formats and messaging resonated with the target audience
  • Deployed video views campaigns to feed brand recognition and build custom audiences based on engaged viewers
  • Provided ongoing creative asset advisory — recommending new content directions based on real campaign performance data
Case Study

Cuadro

Latin American lifestyle and accessories brand. We implemented a monthly ad budget planning system to standardize investment and define clear objectives campaign by campaign — driving sustained, measurable growth across all key metrics.

  • Standardized monthly ad budget planning to define clear campaign-by-campaign objectives
  • Built and optimized audience segments for the Latin American lifestyle market
  • Continuous A/B testing of creatives to maximize engagement and reduce cost per result
  • Managed weekly budget adjustments based on ad set performance data
19.6%
Increase in post reach
69.4%
Website traffic growth via Meta ads
6-9K
New followers monthly
$0.02
Cost per result (down from $0.08)
Case Study

On2Pets

US-based pet furniture brand selling stylish, non-toxic cat trees online. We redefined the full funnel strategy — upper funnel with brand video to drive awareness, middle and bottom funnel fed by lookalike and retargeting audiences built from engaged viewers and site visitors.

  • Optimized and restructured audiences with retargeting and lookalike creation from existing customer data
  • Adapted new creatives to multiple ad formats (feed, stories, reels) for maximum placement coverage
  • Created 5 different versions of each ad and continuously optimized toward the best performing variation
  • Built a full-funnel flow: awareness video at the top, conversion-focused ads retargeting warm audiences at the bottom
42%
Month-over-month sales increase
3%
Average CTR across campaigns
50%
CPC reduced to half
Case Study

Habbio UK

UK-based eco-friendly furniture brand entering a saturated market. We built the brand launch strategy from the ground up — structuring the ad account, building audiences, and running 4 months of foundational campaigns that fed into a record-breaking Black Friday activation.

  • Structured the Business Manager from scratch and created potential audience segments for the UK furniture market
  • Installed Meta Pixel for efficient traffic tracking and to build retargeting audiences from site visitors
  • Ran A/B tests on creatives across formats to identify what resonated with eco-conscious furniture buyers
  • Spent 4 months building and nurturing audiences through awareness campaigns — creating a warm base of engaged prospects

After 4 months — 15% off Black Friday campaign results:

33%
Traffic increase, same budget
3x
Record sales, tripling prior month
↑CTR
Comments & shares driving reach
